abstract: Returns the array of elements that the interface uses to store  parsed report data.
overview:
## Return Value

An array of [doc://com.apple.hiddriverkit/documentation/HIDDriverKit/IOHIDElement] objects containing the parsed data from the report.

## Discussion

This method returns the array of [doc://com.apple.hiddriverkit/documentation/HIDDriverKit/IOHIDElement] objects associated with the interface. Each element contains data for a single aspect of the device’s state. For example, a report from a stylus contains separate elements for the horizontal and vertical position of the stylus, the pressure values, and so on. Use the [doc://com.apple.hiddriverkit/documentation/HIDDriverKit/IOHIDElement/getUsagePage] and [doc://com.apple.hiddriverkit/documentation/HIDDriverKit/IOHIDElement/getUsage] methods of the element to determine the type of information in each element.

This method creates a new set of `IOHIDElement` objects the first time you call it, but it doesn’t update the contents of each element automatically. Call the [doc://com.apple.hiddriverkit/documentation/HIDDriverKit/IOHIDInterface/processReport] method to update the contents of the elements before using this method to retrieve them.

# getElements

**Instance Method**

Returns the array of elements that the interface uses to store  parsed report data.

## Declaration

```swift
virtual OSArray * getElements();
```

## Return Value

An array of [doc://com.apple.hiddriverkit/documentation/HIDDriverKit/IOHIDElement] objects containing the parsed data from the report.

## Discussion

This method returns the array of [doc://com.apple.hiddriverkit/documentation/HIDDriverKit/IOHIDElement] objects associated with the interface. Each element contains data for a single aspect of the device’s state. For example, a report from a stylus contains separate elements for the horizontal and vertical position of the stylus, the pressure values, and so on. Use the [doc://com.apple.hiddriverkit/documentation/HIDDriverKit/IOHIDElement/getUsagePage] and [doc://com.apple.hiddriverkit/documentation/HIDDriverKit/IOHIDElement/getUsage] methods of the element to determine the type of information in each element.

This method creates a new set of `IOHIDElement` objects the first time you call it, but it doesn’t update the contents of each element automatically. Call the [doc://com.apple.hiddriverkit/documentation/HIDDriverKit/IOHIDInterface/processReport] method to update the contents of the elements before using this method to retrieve them.

## Accessing the Elements of a Report

- **commitElements**: Gets or sets the contents of the interface’s stored elements.
